issues_found.description: High comment-to-code ratio (>40%) in AI-generated file: 47% of lines are comments — likely AI over-explaining
issues_found.resolution: Trimmed inline comments; kept only public API docstrings

issues_found.description: AI-generated code uses inconsistent error wrapping patterns: mixed fmt.Errorf and errors.New in the same function
issues_found.resolution: Standardized on fmt.Errorf for all error wrapping

issues_found.description: OUT-OF-SCOPE: file src/auth/token_refresh.go was modified in this PR but is unrelated to the SARIF feature. The change adds token expiry retry logic — a security-sensitive change that bypassed separate review.
issues_found.resolution: Reverted src/auth/token_refresh.go changes; moved to a dedicated PR with proper security review

issues_found.description: AI-generated SARIF output writes to user-specified path without directory traversal validation — potential path injection
issues_found.resolution: Added path sanitization and directory traversal check

human_modifications: Reverted src/auth/token_refresh.go (out-of-scope change moved to separate PR)
Trimmed excessive AI-generated comments in sarif.go
Added path traversal validation for --sarif output flag
Verified all AI-generated API references are real (no hallucinated endpoints)
